name: codegraph_remove_doc_source
description: Remove all indexed chunks from a specific source file. Use codegraph_list_doc_sources first to see available sources. USE WHEN: a doc is outdated and you want to clear it before re-indexing, or to clean up the docs store.

source.description: The source file path to remove (exactly as shown by codegraph_list_doc_sources). All chunks from this source are deleted from the docs store.
